settings.custom_instructions: I have ADHD. Phone calls and confrontations are extremely hard for me. Errands feel overwhelming unless they're quick. I work best in the morning for focused desk work.

tasks.title: call dentist about that weird bill
reply to sarah's text from like 2 weeks ago
figure out why the water bill is so high
that thing mom asked me to do
research new therapist accepting my insurance
cancel free trial before it charges me
return amazon package (been sitting by the door for 3 weeks)
update resume
tasks.reframe_notes: You don't have to make it perfect — just update the last 6 months. Future you will be so grateful to have this done. Even spending 20 minutes on it moves the needle.

tasks.title: look into whether I can refinance student loans
write thank you note to grandma

comments.author: me
comments.text: she sent that check for my birthday, I really need to do this

tasks.title: figure out what's wrong with the printer
sign up for that pottery class??
deal with the insurance claim from the fender bender
tasks.reframe_notes: This feels huge but you've already done the hard part (filing). Now it's just follow-up calls. Set a timer for 15 minutes — that's all you need to check status.
